zh.Sint Nicolaas Kerk, IJsselstein, Utrecht: 荷蘭武特雷特易瑟爾斯坦
zh.IJsselstein, Utrecht, Netherlands: 荷蘭武特雷特易瑟爾斯坦
zh.lifeSummary: 當Maria van Arkel於大約1389年出生在荷蘭-拉藍德希森蘭登時，她的父親Jan V van Arkel28歲，母親Joanna von Jülich22歲。她於1409年6月23日與Jan II Lord of Egmond結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1415年7月19日享年27歲，埋葬在荷蘭武特雷特易瑟爾斯坦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maria van Arkel于大约1389年出生在荷兰-拉藍德希森蘭登时，她的父亲Jan V van Arkel28岁，母亲Joanna von Jülich22岁。她于1409年6月23日与Jan II Lord of Egmond结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1415年7月19日享年27岁，埋葬在荷兰武特雷特易瑟爾斯坦。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Arkel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Yoram, Yosef, Amram, Ari, Avi, Gitty, Haim, Ilan, Moshe, Yaacov, Yaakov.
Jewish: from the Biblical placename Ariel, meaning ‘lion of God’ in Hebrew (compare   Arie  ). It is mentioned in the prophecies of Ezra (8:16) and Isaiah (29:1–2).

variants.name: Arie
meanings: Jewish (Ashkenazic): from the personal name Arye, meaning ‘lion’ in Hebrew.

nameMeanings.name: Maria
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Maria  , of German origin but now also moderately popular in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Maria van Arkel was born about 1389, in Giessenlanden, South Holland, Netherlands, her father, Jan V van Arkel, was 28 and her mother, Joanna von Jülich, was 22. She married Jan II Lord of Egmond on 23 June 1409. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died on 19 July 1415, at the age of 27, and was buried in IJsselstein, Utrecht, Netherlands.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maria van Arkel est née environ 1389, à Giessenlanden, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas, son père, Jan V van Arkel, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Joanna von Jülich, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Jan II Lord of Egmond le 23 juin 1409. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée le 19 juillet 1415, à l’âge de 27 ans, et a été enterrée à IJsselstein, Utrecht, Pays-Bas.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maria van Arkel um 1389 in Giessenlanden, Südholland, Niederlande geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jan V van Arkel 28 und ihre Mutter Joanna von Jülich 22. Sie hat am 23. Juni 1409 Jan II Lord of Egmond geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb am 19. Juli 1415 im Alter von 27 Jahren und wurde in IJsselstein, Utrecht, Niederlande begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maria van Arkel è nata il circa 1389 nel Giessenlanden, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi, sua padre, Jan V van Arkel, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Joanna von Jülich, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Jan II Lord of Egmond il 23 giugno 1409. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 19 luglio 1415, all'età di 27 anni, e fu sepolta a IJsselstein, Utrecht, Paesi Bassi.

ja.Egmond-Binnen, North Holland, Netherland: オランダノオルド-hオランドエグモンド-ビン

ja.Egmond, North Holland, Netherlands: オランダノオルド-hオランドエグモンド
ja.lifeSummary: Maria van Arkelが約1389年にオランダズイド-hオランドギエセンランデンで生まれた時，父Jan V van Arkelは28歳，母Joanna von Jülichは22歳であった。1409年6月23日にJan II Lord of Egmondと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1415年7月19日に27歳で死去し，オランダウトレチトイジセルステインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Maria van Arkel(이)가 대략 1389년 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 기센랜든에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jan V van Arkel(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joanna von Jülich(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1409년 6월 23일 Jan II Lord of Egmond(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1415년 7월 19일 27세의 나이로 사망했으며 네덜란드 우트레트 이제이셀스타인에 묻혔다.

pt.Egmond-Binnen, North Holland, Netherland: Egmond-Binnen, Holanda do Norte, Países Baixos
pt.Egmond, North Holland, Netherlands: Egmond, Holanda do Norte, Países Baixos
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maria van Arkel nasceu aproximadamente 1389, em Giessenlanden, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos, seu pai, Jan V van Arkel, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Joanna von Jülich, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Jan II Lord of Egmond em 23 de junho de 1409. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 19 de julho de 1415, com 27 anos, e foi sepultada em IJsselstein, Utrecht, Países Baixos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maria van Arkel родилась около 1389 г. в местности гиессенланден, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды, её отцу по имени Jan V van Arkel было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Joanna von Jülich, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jan II Lord of Egmond 23 июня 1409 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла 19 июля 1415 г. в возрасте 27 лет и была похоронена в местности иджсселстин, утречт, Нидерланды.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maria van Arkel nació aproximadamente 1389, en Giessenlanden, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos, su papá, Jan V van Arkel, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Joanna von Jülich, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Jan II Lord of Egmond el 23 de junio de 1409. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 19 de julio de 1415, a la edad de 27 años, y fue sepultada en IJsselstein, Utrecht, Países Bajos.
